hero.headline: Your Family's Pool, Built by Ours
hero.subheadline: For over 44 years, the DesRochers family has designed and built award-winning inground pools across Northern Illinois. From fiberglass and vinyl construction to hot tubs and full-service maintenance, we treat every backyard like our own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Backyard Needs<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to hot tubs, maintenance, and supplies, DesRochers is your one-stop shop for the complete backyard experience. Three locations serving all of Northern Illinois.

cards.title: Fiberglass Pool Construction
cards.description: Nationally award-winning fiberglass inground pool installation with custom designs tailored to your family's lifestyle. Over 40 years of construction expertise in every build.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Pool Construction
cards.description: Expert vinyl liner inground pool building with personalized design consultations, precision installation, and lasting craftsmanship your family will enjoy for decades.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Authorized Caldera and Fantasy dealer with a full showroom experience. Our team helps you find the perfect hot tub for relaxation, therapy, or family fun.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly service including water chemistry management, equipment inspection, cleaning, and repairs from technicians who know your pool inside and out.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal opening and closing services performed by experienced professionals who protect your investment through every Illinois winter and get you swimming every spring.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with a complete liner replacement. We handle removal, surface prep, and precision installation for a like-new finish.

how_it_works.headline: From Dream to Dive-In — Here's How It Works

steps.title: Visit a Showroom or Call Us
steps.description: Stop by our Wilmington, Shorewood, or Morris location or give us a call. We'll listen to your vision, answer every question, and walk you through your options with zero pressure.

steps.title: We Design Your Perfect Backyard
steps.description: Our team creates a custom plan tailored to your yard, budget, and family's needs. From pool shape and size to patio and spa — we handle every detail so you don't have to.

steps.title: Enjoy Generations of Fun
steps.description: We build it right, back it up with ongoing service, and stay just a phone call away for anything you need. Your backyard becomes the place where family memories are made.

about.label: Why Northern Illinois Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business Serving Families Since 1982
about.description: DesRochers Backyard Pools & Spas has been a family-owned and operated cornerstone of Northern Illinois since 1982. What started as one family's passion for pools has grown into a nationally recognized, award-winning builder with three locations across the region. We still answer the phone ourselves, know our customers by name, and believe that building a pool should feel as good as swimming in one. That's why generations of families keep coming back.

features.title: 44 Years of Family Expertise
features.description: Since 1982, the DesRochers family has passed down their craft through generations. You get decades of hard-earned knowledge and a team that genuinely cares about your project.

features.title: National Award-Winning Quality
features.description: Our construction quality has been recognized at the national level. Every pool we build reflects the same craftsmanship and attention to detail that earned those awards.

features.title: Three Locations, One Standard
features.description: With showrooms in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris, we're always close by. Every location offers the same personal service, expert staff, and full product selection.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing From a Family You Can Trust
pricing.subtitle: Every backyard is different, so we provide detailed, transparent quotes after understanding your specific needs. No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch — just fair pricing backed by 44 years of integrity.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every service we perform. If something isn't right, the DesRochers family takes it personally. We'll make it right — quickly, professionally, and at no extra cost to you. That's the same promise we've kept since 1982, and it's why families across Northern Illinois trust us with their backyards.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most fiberglass pool installations are completed in 2-4 weeks from the start of excavation. Vinyl liner pools can take 4-8 weeks depending on complexity. During your design consultation, we'll provide a detailed timeline specific to your project so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Which is better — fiberglass or vinyl liner?
faqs.answer: Both are excellent choices and we specialize in both. Fiberglass pools offer faster installation, lower lifetime maintenance, and exceptional durability. Vinyl liner pools offer more shape flexibility and a lower upfront cost. We'll help you weigh the pros and cons based on your yard, budget, and preferences.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Northern Illinois?
faqs.answer: We serve Wilmington, Shorewood, Morris, Joliet, Plainfield, New Lenox, Minooka, Channahon, Essex, and surrounding Northern Illinois communities. With three locations, we're never far from your backyard.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service team handles maintenance, repairs, openings, closings, and liner replacements on all inground pools — regardless of who built them. We're here to help every pool owner in the region.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showrooms before making a decision?
faqs.answer: We encourage it! Our Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris showrooms feature pool displays, hot tub models, patio furniture, and a full supply store. Our staff is always on hand to answer questions with zero pressure to buy.

testimonials.name: Jennifer P.
testimonials.text: I can honestly say each and everyone associated with DesRochers is the best of the best! Their knowledge and customer service is by far unbeaten anywhere. How many people would give you their cell phone number? That's right... not many!

testimonials.name: John Q.
testimonials.text: The DesRochers team has been closing my in-ground fiberglass pool for over 8 years. Some of the best customer service in Will County.

testimonials.name: Leo R.
testimonials.text: DesRochers installed our inground pool 10 years ago and we're still impressed with their service.

contact.headline: Let's Build Your Backyard Oasis
contact.subtitle: Whether you're dreaming about a new pool, need service on an existing one, or just want to browse our showroom — we'd love to hear from you.
benefits: Free design consultation with zero obligation
Visit any of our three Northern Illinois showrooms

footer.description: DesRochers Backyard Pools & Spas has been Northern Illinois' trusted family-owned pool builder since 1982. Award-winning construction, expert service, and three convenient locations.
footer.service_area: Serving Wilmington, Shorewood, Morris, Joliet, Plainfield, New Lenox, Minooka, Channahon, Essex & all of Northern Illinois
